name: Form: Update Field

description.en: Update a field in an existing form.
description.de: Ein Feld eines bestehenden Formulars aktualisieren.

bot: Use this to update a field on an existing form. First fetch the current definition via GET, modify the target input in definition.actions[0].inputs, then PATCH with the full updated definition.

inputs.name: Definition
inputs.bot: The full updated warp definition JSON with the modified field. Find the field by slug in definition.actions[0].inputs, update only what changed, keep everything else intact.
